response.name: is_palindrome
response.description: Checks if a string is a palindrome while ignoring case and whitespace.
response.code:
def is_palindrome(text: str) -> bool:
    \"\"\"
    Checks if a string is a palindrome, ignoring case and spaces.
    
    Args:
        text (str): The string to check.
        
    Returns:
        bool: True if it is a palindrome, False otherwise.
    \"\"\"
    if not isinstance(text, str):
        return False
        
    # Remove spaces and convert to lowercase
    cleaned = \"\".join(text.split()).lower()
    
    # Check if string matches its reverse
    return cleaned == cleaned[::-1]
